## What framework or language would you like supported?

E.g. "Nightwatch.js in TypeScript" or "Selenium in C#"

## Why is this important to you?

Describe your use case and how many people on your team would benefit.

## Example Output

If you have an idea of what the generated POM file should look like, paste an example here:

```
// your expected output here
```

## References

Links to the framework's official documentation or selector API that would help with implementation.
